title: Journal of the Graduate School of Sufi Studies

Journal of the Graduate School of Sufi Studies

About

Editors

Numbers

Contact

Üsküdar University Journal of the Institute of Sufi Studies (TAED) focuses on research and studies on Sufi thought, history and literature, as well as their philosophical, social and cultural, anthropological and artistic aspects.

The journal is a double-blind peer-reviewed journal published twice a year, in May and November. The language is Turkish and English.

The journal aims to make an academic contribution to the visibility and research of Sufi studies in the field of Islamic studies, Sufi perspective on Islamic Civilization and Ottoman Sufi thought.
